title: helenium scorzonerifolium
intro: Helenium scorzonerifolium, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that grows in the eastern United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Helenium scorzonerifolium include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated skin and mucous membranes. Helenium scorzonerifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
